ValidationRule.description: SQO required from Sales Process on
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Qualifying")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Discovery")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"On Hold")), ISPICKVAL(SQL__c , "") ,RecordType.Id='012Dn000000mrO3IAI')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SQO required from Sales Process on
